caption: A sequence of shots captures a view from a doorway into a brightly lit bathroom. A wooden door frame is visible on the left side of the scene. Inside the bathroom, a white, rounded vessel sink sits atop a wooden vanity, paired with a modern chrome faucet. Behind the sink, the wall is decorated with light-colored square tiles, and a black-framed mirror hangs above. Through the open doorway in the background, a glimpse of another room is visible, showing a white radiator and a small piece of furniture. The camera maintains a steady position, and no people are present. The frames show a slight shift in perspective and focus, moving slightly closer to the sink and vanity area as the sequence progresses, emphasizing the clean, modern interior design of the space.
